lead: We collaborate with select landlords and developers to create distinctive retail destinations by bringing together targeted, best-in-class tenants.

sections.heading: Global Reach
sections.body: Having completed thousands of transactions across the United States, Canada, and Europe, our team has built strong relationships with major landlords, developers, and retailers worldwide — and a deep understanding of the specific elements that drive success, or failure, in real estate projects throughout the world.

sections.heading: Placemaking
sections.body: Skilled placemakers, we curate compelling merchandising plans with a unique, market-relevant leasing vision — bringing together targeted, best-in-class tenants in transformational and innovative retail environments.

sections.heading: Reporting
sections.body: Dedicated Project Managers ensure maximum transparency. Using industry-leading software, they keep our clients' finger on the pulse with accurate, on-demand reporting and timely, consistent communication, customized to each project.

featured.title: The Shops at Sportsmen's Lodge
featured.body: An open-air retail and dining destination in the heart of Studio City, merchandised and leased to serve the surrounding community with a curated mix of lifestyle tenants.

caseStudies.title: URBN Portfolio
caseStudies.narrative: Representation across the URBN portfolio on Amsterdam's premier luxury shopping street — placing the right tenants on one of Europe's most demanding high streets.

quote.quote: Having this global presence helps me when I'm looking globally, but it also gives me a more worldly sort of wisdom and advice when I'm looking in the United States.
quote.name: Stephen Starr

intelTeaser: Tenant pipelines, merchandising mix, market briefs. The intelligence behind every leasing plan.
